data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — pre-commit-review-gate.sh has inline MERGE_HEAD detection (lines 202-233) and REBASE_HEAD detection (lines 251-295); merge-state.sh provides ms_filter_to_worktree_only() which encapsulates both filtering paths. Tests already exist covering both paths. TDD exemption applies (substitutive refactor, no new logic).
